prompt: In this mixed flop spot, choose bet.
why_v1: Bet when fold pressure and value both support action.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Betting fits the track cue set, so the line presses value or denial before a passive check gives the edge away.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Bet is right here because the mixed flop cues support both fold pressure and value instead of giving a free card.
